name: SysJust Co., Ltd.
summary: SysJust Co., Ltd. operates as a financial technology company in Taiwan. It offers various platforms, including XQ Global Winner, XS strategy radar, and XQ mobile platform; WQ new VIP viewing room; MoneyDJ; Lok Fu Finance channel for data analysis and reading on smart phones, tablets, and computers; and database. The company was founded in 1999 and is headquartered in New Taipei City, Taiwan.
